title: Subarray Sums Divisible by K
hints: Consider the prefix sums of the array. How does the remainder of a subarray sum relate to the remainders of its prefix sums?
Use a frequency map to count how many times each prefix sum remainder modulo K has occurred.
Subarrays with sums divisible by K correspond to pairs of prefix sums sharing the same remainder; count these pairs using the stored frequencies.
